title: STORM TRADING GROUP Large Garden Planters Flower Pots Slate & Lazio Effect Trough Square Patio Planters Pewter Grey (Slate Trough, 1 Planter)
features: LOVELY GARDEN PLANTERS: Perfect for most gardens our planters are great for adding some beauty to your outside areas. Hand finished giving a genuine metal look these planters are lightweight made from plastic and easy to carry so you can move them around easily. These planters are weather resistant and are a lovely addition to your garden or patio areas.

LARGE SQUARE LAZIO PLANTER: 38cm Square , 39cm Height - Crafted from durable plastic with a distressed grey finish, this square Lazio planter features a decorative metal effect design with a cross pattern. This planter is lightweight. As the planter is frost resistant, it is ideal for both indoor and outdoor use.

LAZIO TROUGH: 30cm Depth, 70cm Width, 33cm Height - Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, this Lazio trough is perfect for planting fresh summer flowers for a stunning focal point to any outdoor space. The trough is crafted from a polymer that is durable and frost resistant which is complete with a large capacity suitable to hold compost and soil for a stunning finishing touch.
SLATE TROUGH: 60cm Length, 25cm Width, 25.5cm Height - This slate effect trough planter is ideal for planting or placing your favourite flowers and plants. This is a great choice for your garden

LARGE SQUARE SLATE PLANTER: 38cm Square, 39cm Height - Create a beautiful floral display in your outdoor space with this large square slate planter. Made with durable material, it features a slate-effect finish that complements any modern setting.
SELECT YOUR PLANTER: Simply select your desired planter from the menu above by taking a look at the images
